title: Welcome to Le Cour
overview: The bakers give a bag of bread to Rana.

title: The Day of the Storm
overview: The townspeople receive a warning about the storm.

title: Blackout
overview: Rick touches a magical pendant and Queen sees the warship.

title: Mechanical Doll
overview: The soldiers salvage the crate and take the key part Hank needed for system reboot.

title: As If Melting
overview: Melty tastes the bread and makes ice cream for the girls.

title: Request from the Prince
overview: The bakers repair the furnace and Xiao Mei leaves the castle after being seen.

title: Everyone`s Heart
overview: Rick forgets the past and the pirates visit the island.

title: Mysterious Thief Again
overview: Hank uses the key part to awaken Queen and she leaves the workshop.

title: Messenger from Another World
overview: Kaguya and Queen arrive on the ship without the pendant, and the pirates return to the island.

title: The Decisive Battle
overview: When Kaguya gets trapped in the ship, Rick, Queen and the pirates infiltrate it.

title: Bread of Happiness
overview: To save Kaguya, Rick uses the pendant and Queen destroys the ship.
